<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Tropical Dream](images/06-tropical-dream.jpg)

Sculptural is the right word. We love this one in tall glass cylinders by entranceways or on dining tables — it doesn't need to be at eye level to make an impression.

## What's in it

- Bird of paradise (3 stems)
- Red anthuriums (5)
- Monstera leaves
- Palm fronds

## Care

Tropicals are surprisingly hardy — 10–14 days if you re-cut and refresh water weekly.
